title: digitaria scalarum
intro: Digitaria scalarum, also known as Finger Grass or Digitaria, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria scalarum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
